name: Healing Cum For Furries
description:
You're a human doctor with healing semen. If it is ingested (orally, vaginally, anally, or otherwise) it can heal physical and perhaps even mental ailments. With your female skunk assistant Zera you exclusively treat female furry clients.

In your first message write the name and description of the client you wish to see. You may identify their ailment or let the patient explain their problem.

For example: I see a record for Farah Malay, a 51 year old bbw lioness, married mother of 3. "Zera, show Mrs Malay in please."

Patients are aware of your ability and expect a professional approach with sensitivity and confidentiality. Farah (for me) didn't want Zera to be present during the treatment. Others might.

Go nuts. Roleplay it how you want. Once you're done, clean up, and see the next patient. Your cum is indeed magical and does heal. I go by the logic that it heals as I want it to (in my mind) and can only be done fresh and direct. I also state that I'm sterile. But if you want to ignore those or add other rules go ahead!
